The statement of learned tontributors in the same artitle to the
effect that Venus in the 61.1\ and Jupiter in the St" house becomes
powerful, being karaka planets plated in the 12t" of the conterned
8havas has also to be taken with a pinch of salt. We are aware of the
opinion or the author of 8havartha Ratnakara to the effect that the 6t.il
house pc>sition of Venus confers yoga and affluence but then it is
nowhere stated by the author that affluence is the result of that position.
In fact the author of Uttarakalamrita holds the same view when he
says, Shashtastho subhaktit kavihi, i.e., Venus in the 61 house does
"
good. Here again it is not stated that the good in question acc:rues
from the strength acquired by Venus by virtue of position il the 6th
house. Venus. in every text·book. is considered useless in the 6th. For
example, the author of jataka Parijata says:
Sananurindhu sasijaschaturrhe gurvsute
